textData.text: The New Means of Production: AI Workshop for Progressive Organizers
Join our AI Workshop tailored for progressive organizers and activists. Explore how to use AI for social good while maintaining your ethics and values.
Engage in interactive sessions to experiment with LLMs using Liberation Labs' assistant frameworks.
Discover how AI can enhance organizing efforts ethically, what tools fit your cause, and where to find resources
Stay in touch with each other and our organizer community in the Liberation Labs Discord server.
